label: Quality Profitability
signal: Novy-Marx gross profitability, long top quintile.
description: Novy-Marx profitability tilt: long Mkt + ½RMW when the 12m cumulative RMW signal is positive, else market only. FF5 RMW (Compustat GP construction was OOM; quality_v2 variant rebuilt it from the Compustat zip via DuckDB — see below). Monthly, 5bps/side.
reference: Novy-Marx (2013), 'The Other Side of Value: The Gross Profitability Premium'
